meta.title: DARPA announces plans to build an American HYPERSONIC BOMBER
meta.description:
Sign up for a 14-day free trial and enjoy all the amazing features MyHeritage has to offer: https://bit.ly/Sandboxx_MH

-- Break --

One of the most secretive agencies within the Defense Department, the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency, or DARPA, has just revealed its ongoing plans to field a fully-reusable hypersonic bomber for the future of American airstrike operations in highly contested environments.
